yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Threat_actors_use_custom_AuraInspector_t {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Threat actors use custom AuraInspector to harvest data from Salesforce systems"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-11"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-07" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "AuraInspector" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_US_CISA_adds_Ivanti_EPM_SolarWinds_and_O {

        date = "2026-03-11"
    strings:

        $kw0 = "SolarWinds" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
